title: Skalary LLM Eval Case
description: Documentation/IDE aid for plugins/<name>/evals/llm/*.eval.json. Runtime validation is implemented in PowerShell (no schema engine dependency).

artifact.description: Plugin-manifest destination path to evaluate (dest value, not src).

scenario.description: Prompt/scenario text fed to the target artifact.

rubric.description: Concrete judge criteria; each entry must be non-empty.

passThreshold.description: Optional per-case threshold; defaults to global config threshold.
